runners.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a one length second but did clock a brilliant 19.54 over the 342m journey. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

runners.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Gawler to win by 6 lengths in 22.21, beating Carry On Kim. Last start finished 7th in a OPEN on April 5 over 400m at Gawler behind Diogo Keeping beaten 14 lengths (23.26). Racing well and has to be included.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at Murray Bridge (25.95) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4 length second. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from nine starts. Others rate better this time.

runners.formComment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by a nose in a OPEN at this track and clocking a brilliant 19.52 for the 342m trip. Worth including on winning run two back.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 342m at this track in a handy (19.55), beating Breaker Of Rules. Will find this a bit tougher, doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.
